reviews.comment:
Te comés una fila tremenda, siempre hay muchos autos, por lo que recomendaría ir a otro lugar. Por otro lado, le pregunté a una señora si conocía otra estación de servicio cerca y me dijo "no, porque acá tienen la mejor nafta", la verdad no se qué significa eso pero dejo el dato.

(Translated by Google)
You'll find yourself in a huge line; there are always tons of cars, so I'd recommend going somewhere else. On another note, I asked a woman if she knew of another gas station nearby, and she said, "No, because they have the best gas here." I don't really know what that means, but I thought I'd mention it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12748059352839021938/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5NnBfaWJBEAE

reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
Temporada alta y atendiendo solo dos empleados!! Pésimo,  tres islas y una sola en funcionamiento!! Tremendo demorarse una hora para cargar

(Translated by Google)
Peak season and only two employees working!! Terrible, three pumps and only one working!! It's awful to have to wait an hour to fill up.

reviews.comment:
Horrible hoy fui estaba cerrada en plena temporada dicen que le estaban haciendo una inspeccionlos empleados 10 puntos  las inspecciones se hacen fuerte noche o bien temprano me fui sin cargar combustible me dijeron tenían para 1 hora más por lo menos..me fui a la Shellde la rotonda

(Translated by Google)
It was awful today. I went and it was closed in the middle of peak season. They said they were doing an inspection. The employees were excellent. The inspections are done thoroughly at night or very early in the morning. I left without filling up. They told me they'd have to wait at least another hour. I went to the Shell station at the roundabout.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12748059352839021938/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5OUlIeDFnRRAB
